Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jan-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Judgment in favor of plaintiff to be entered forthwith.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
